name: NullPointerException in UserService
prompt: I'm getting 'TypeError: NoneType object is not subscriptable' at line 23 in null_deref.py when calling get_user_display_name(999). Help me debug this.
expected_root_cause: find_by_id returns None for non-existent user IDs, but the caller accesses dict keys without checking for None
secondary_bug_description: Same null-deref pattern exists in get_user_email
